allow: Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.main import app; print\('app loaded:', app.title\)")
Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip show h11 httpcore respx)
Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip show h11 httpcore respx httpx)
Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys; [print\(p\) for p in sys.path]")
Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install --force-reinstall --no-deps h11 httpcore -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple)
Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import h11, httpcore, httpx, respx; print\('all OK'\)")
